---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new endpoint, analysis metric, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or use case you're trying to address.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links, examples, related issues, or anything else relevant.

---

> Before submitting: check the [ROADMAP.md](../../docs/ROADMAP.md) to see if this is already planned,
> and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for what kinds of contributions fit the project.
